plugins.name: elevenlabs-brand-kit
plugins.description: ElevenLabs Brand Kit — brand assets, design guidelines, and creative workflows for producing on-brand ElevenLabs content. Includes branded web development, branded presentations, HyperFrames video production (HTML+GSAP), and universal brand enforcement.
